description: This is a Java interface named SmsProvider, which defines a contract for sending SMS notifications within the Business Loan backend application. It declares a method 'send' that takes a NotificationRequest object, a phone number in E.164 format, and a message string.

classes.name: SmsProvider
classes.description: A Java interface defining the contract for SMS notification providers, requiring implementation of the 'send' method.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Sends an SMS notification based on the provided NotificationRequest, target phone number in E.164 format, and message string.
